calendar.matters:
Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar May-31-2011 Granted Per Written Order

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Jan-21-2011 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jonathan Piper for Cynthia Perry (Petitioner/Trustee).

Mr. Piper stated that he was still trying to determine the value of the Life Insurance policy, that he was brought in by the Department of Social Services, that the Life Insurance policy was inheritted from the Wife and that Mr. Long never designated a Beneficiary. In addition, he stated that he just obtained the death certificate last week, that the policy has a cash value of $8,000.00 and that he needs access to funds so that he could get the apartment listed. The Court granted the petition for each of the requests (as it relates to the bank accounts subject to review of the order) with the exception of the Life Insurance policy.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy F. Smith.

Petition For Order Confirming Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-22-2010 Continued To Jan-11-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
